title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: Kimi K2.6, released by MoonShot AI, is a coding-optimized LLM model designed for long-running tasks and agent swarm applications. It represents a maturation in Chinese AI labs' model development with improved capabilities over the K2.5 version.
